rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynser Rectory a secundo die Novembris 1703, ad eundem diem 1704.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's approach for combining the two physical lines of the header into one logical description. Corrected 'Paynter' to 'Paynser' based on visual inspection. gpt-5-mini split this header into two separate rows.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput. de remanentib' in Cista
rows.notes: Adopted amounts and row_type from gpt-5-mini, as gemini-flash incorrectly identified this as a header and missed the amounts. Corrected description based on visual inspection ('reddidit', 'comput.', 'remanentib'', 'Cista'). Added pence fraction 0.5 ('ob') based on visual mark per special rules, which gpt-5-mini noted but did not apply.
Adopted amounts and row_type from gpt-5-mini. Used gemini-flash's description ('arreragijs') as more visually accurate. gemini-flash incorrectly identified this as a header.

Visual verification: Description is 'Guanear'. Amounts are clearly '76 0 0'. Both extractors had significant alignment issues for this row's values. gpt-5-mini had the correct pounds value, but misread shillings/pence. Overrode all values based on image.

Visual verification: Description is 'Longwitnam'. Amounts are clearly '— 13 4' (no pounds value, indicated by a dash). Both extractors had severe alignment issues, pulling incorrect values from other rows. Overrode all values based on image.

Visual verification: Description is 'minhinnett'. Amounts are clearly '20 0 0'. Both extractors had severe alignment issues, pulling incorrect values from other rows. Overrode all values based on image.

Visual verification: Description is 'Southnewington pro mici'. Amounts are clearly '30 0 0'. Both extractors had severe alignment issues. Used gemini-flash's description as more accurate. Overrode all values based on image.
Visual verification: No amounts visible on this line (dashes). Both extractors mis-aligned amounts. Overrode all values based on image.

Visual verification: Description is 'Chockhill' and no amounts are present on this line (dashes). Used gemini-flash's description as more accurate. Both extractors correctly identified the absence of amounts.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts and the 'q' farthing fraction (0.25). gpt-5-mini was incorrect on shillings, pence, and missed the fraction.
Visual verification: Description is 'Tue quitrents' and no amounts are present. gemini-flash correctly identified it as a header. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment error and misread 'Tue' as 'Tree'.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts and the description ('marshall's'). gpt-5-mini had amount alignment issues and a minor description error ('marshally').
Visual verification: No amounts visible on this line (dashes). gemini-flash was correct. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment error.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts. gpt-5-mini had amount alignment issues.
Both extractors identified the correct amounts. Adopted gemini-flash's description ('Mountaoue') as visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Mountague'.
Visual verification: No amounts visible on this line (dashes). gemini-flash was correct. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment error and misread 'Hughes' as 'Hugheys', also noting its own uncertainty.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts and the description ('Greeneuay'). gpt-5-mini had amount alignment issues, misread the name, and expressed uncertainty.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts. gpt-5-mini had amount alignment issues and expressed uncertainty.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly reported no amounts for this line and expressed uncertainty.
Visual verification: No amounts visible on this line (dashes). gemini-flash was correct. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment error and expressed uncertainty.
Visual verification: No amounts visible on this line (dashes). gemini-flash was correct. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment error and expressed uncertainty.

Based on visual verification. The image shows 'Tintinhull { Napper' with an amount on the same line. gemini-flash correctly extracted the amounts and fraction, but mis-spelled 'Napper' as 'Nopper'. gpt-5-mini over-segmented this into a parent row and a sub-row, misread the pence, and missed the fraction for 'Napper'.
Both extractors (gemini-flash R23, gpt-5-mini R25) agreed on the amounts and recognized it as a distinct entry. Pre-pended '{' to the description for visual accuracy reflecting the ledger's grouping.

Adopted gemini-flash's extraction, which correctly identified the amounts. gpt-5-mini had an amount alignment issue.
Consensus on description and amounts. gpt-5-mini noted uncertainty in alignment but still got the correct value for this row.
Both extractors correctly identified the amounts. Adopted gemini-flash's description ('Tretbewin') as visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Trelhewin'.
Consensus on description and absence of amounts.

Consensus on amounts and row type. Adopted gemini-flash's description ('Annosragionum') as more accurate, as gpt-5-mini's 'Arrearagiorum receptorum' appears to be an over-interpretation of faint or non-existent text.
